out_of_scope_note: Comparative anatomy / primate evolution paper: Bayesian phylogenetic analysis of thumb-length vs brain-size correlation across 95 fossil and extant primate species. Concerns gross neuroanatomy and morphological coevolution in deep evolutionary time, not computational neuroscience (no neural coding, perception, decision, or computational/algorithmic-level account of brain function). Outside the lab's scope of perceptual/cognitive computation, though it touches on brain-size scaling.
